payload.review_text: Plan-safety audit iteration 1 of PLAN-AA1. 1 blocker. BLOCKER H302 (Step 3): Step 3 instructs the executor to 'run python -m pytest tests/diarizer --collect-only -q' and 'must re-derive these counts live'. plan-executor-sonnet has no Bash (disallowedTools, F1 Option C) and cannot run shell commands from a Step body; the embedded Context numbers and the parent-context acceptance: commands do not substitute for a properly scoped Step. Fix: reword Step 3 to use the verified ground-truth numbers embedded in Context (111 total; test_config 14, test_crosstalk 10, test_gates 29, test_measurement 8, test_output 9, test_pipeline 16, test_preprocessing 9, test_webapp_smoke 16) via Read/Edit only; note that live collection is verified by the acceptance items in the Verification section running in parent context; the executor must NOT attempt to run pytest. Substrate fidelity PASS (DEFAULT_CONFIG cli.py:27, find_completed_session session.py:50, Transcribe.cmd repo root). Falsifiability PASS. PSZ001 not triggered (3 steps). Non-blocker PPV warn: four verify: grep -q lines are POSIX-only (warn severity; CI baseline Ubuntu, not promoted). Nits: Step 1 three-edit cohesion; Step 2 placement latitude; last_updated hardcoded 2026-07-03.

findings.message: Step 3 directs the Bash-less executor to run pytest --collect-only and 're-derive counts live'. plan-executor-sonnet has no shell access. Executor cannot comply.
findings.suggested_fix: Reword Step 3 to use the embedded ground-truth numbers via Read/Edit; state the executor must NOT run pytest; note the acceptance items re-derive live in parent context.

findings.message: Four verify: lines use POSIX grep -q, unavailable in PowerShell. warn-severity per plan-safe PPV rules (CI baseline Ubuntu, not Windows-declared).
findings.suggested_fix: Add # platform: posix to each, or rewrite as portable python -c assertions.
